text: Inside this modern building, the glass and the bright walls give an impression of cleanliness and openness—perhaps almost sterile. I feel like a participant in a story of curiosity, poised on the edge of discovery, as I dwell outside this exhibition space. The anticipation of insight stirs within me, mingled with a quiet sense of reverence for the ideas waiting just beyond the glass. I wonder what revelations or provocations might be found inside.
